# EcoVila

EcoVila is an all-inclusive villa complex near Orheiul Vechi, Moldova. It offers 25 guest rooms: 8 small villas, 7 large villas, and 10 hotel rooms, plus a staff-bookable conference room.

Languages: Romanian, Russian, English.

Canonical pages:
- Romanian: https://ecovila.md/
- Russian: https://ecovila.md/ru/
- English: https://ecovila.md/en/

Key services:
- All-inclusive stays with accommodation, three meals per day, and SPA access.
- SPA facilities include warm indoor pool, cold pool, salt room, sauna, jacuzzi, hamam, sensory shower, and resting area.
- Accommodation options include small villas, large villas, and hotel rooms.
- Card payments are processed through Maib ePay; cash payment is available through the EcoVila office flow.
- Pets, outside food, outside drinks, and speakers are not allowed on the property.

Contact:
- Phone: +373 60 120 220
- Email: rezervari@ecovila.md
- Region: Orheiul Vechi, Moldova

Important implementation notes:
- The Romanian homepage at https://ecovila.md/ is the canonical default page.
- There is no separate crawlable Romanian /ro/ duplicate.
- Legacy PHP URLs should be redirected to their closest static equivalents before production deployment.
